description: Hand-rolled WebSocket echo on the Minima engine — a from-scratch C# multi-reactor io_uring server (direct io_uring syscalls via libc, multishot accept + multishot recv into a provided buffer ring, one ring per core with SO_REUSEPORT). The RFC 6455 handshake and the frame parser/masking/echo are written by hand on Minima's raw recv/send API; no WebSocket library.
